security_findings.title: Hardcoded keyword_password Detected
security_findings.description:
Meaning: A password string was detected in plain text.
Reason: Passwords should never be stored in code as it compromises account security.

Context:
"message": "Possible hardcoded password: 'https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token'",
security_findings.remediation: Move sensitive data to environment variables or secure vault

security_findings.description:

Reason: Passwords should never be stored in code as it compromises account security.

security_findings.remediation: Move sensitive data to environment variables or secure vault

security_findings.description:
Meaning: A password string was detected in plain text.
